title.en: So, he hurried directly to the Realm Court.

content.en:
The Realm Court Branch of the Eternal Realm was very far away from the Endless Realm Alliance, and even as an Eternal Realm God Realm, it would take a long time for him to travel there.

However, Ye Tian learned the location of the Boundary Court Branch from the Lone Star Realm Alliance.

So, he hurried directly to the Realm Court.

Time passed slowly, and after a long time, Ye Tian arrived at the Boundary Court Branch.

......

Countless powerful formations shrouded this void, and one after another towering palaces stood above the void, one of which was an incomparably terrifying palace, covering everything, and the terrifying aura radiated the surrounding territory.

This is the Boundary Division.

After Ye Tian came here, an Eternal Realm God Realm appeared.

"New Eternal Realm God Realm, please come to me!"

This Eternal Realm God Realm said.

Ye Tian followed the other party into the Boundary Court Branch, and then went to register as a member of the Boundary Court.

And after Ye Tian communicated with this Eternal Realm God Realm, he also learned a little about the basic situation of the Realm Court.

Soon after, Ye Tian completed his registration and became a member of the Realm Court.

After that, Ye Tian learned that this Realm Realm Branch was in charge of the Eternal Realm, and there were a total of more than 3,000 Eternal Realm God Realms guarding here for a long time, and most of the Eternal Realm Divine Realms stayed at the Realm God Realm.

After becoming a member of the Realm Court, Ye Tian also obtained a basic cultivation material, which was about the cultivation materials of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, which was also the benefit of every Eternal Realm Divine Realm who joined the Realm of the Realm.

Of course, becoming a member of the Realm Court doesn't mean that you don't have to do nothing, and you also need to support some Eternal Kingdom Alliances.

For example, if an Eternal Realm Alliance asks for help from the Realm, then the nearby Eternal Realm must come to the rescue.

Of course, there is no time required for this, so this support is a bit particular, and it is okay to deliberately delay time, but it will offend other members of the Realm.

After all, the Eternal Realm Alliance that is qualified to ask for help from the Realm Court either has the Eternal Realm God Realm itself, or knows the members of the Realm Court.

It's like the original Thousand Mountains Kingdom Alliance, which thought that a member of the Realm Court would ask for help from a certain Realm member, and the Realm would invite the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom Alliance to support, and this would be the only way to support.

Of course.

If the current Alliance of the Kingdom of the Gods encounters a crisis, it can also ask the Realm Court for help, but whether there is a strong person to support, or whether it will not have time to support, everything is unknown.

In addition, if you are in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom, you will not be able to receive a distress message.

Ye Tian joined the Realm Court, and the position he filled in was naturally not the Endless Realm Alliance, but the Myriad Gods Alliance, anyway, he was not too far away from the Myriad Gods Realm Alliance, and it didn't take too long to rush over.

......

Not long after, Ye Tian already knew the cultivation division of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

"The cultivation of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm is divided according to the realm spirits, except for the cultivation of the realm spirits, it is just an ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realm, once the first realm spirit is cultivated, then the cultivation will skyrocket, and it belongs to the initial stage of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, and if you condense four realm spirits, you will belong to the middle level of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, if you condense more than seven realm spirits, you will belong to the high level of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm, and if you condense more than ten realm spirits, you will belong to the peak of the Eternal Realm Divine Realm'. "

"And the limit of the number of Realm Spirits in the Eternal Realm God Realm depends on one's own Eternal Dao Species, some Eternal Dao Species are very ordinary, and they can't even condense ten Realm Spirits, so they can't cultivate to the peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm at all. "

"Realm spirits also have grade divisions, lower realm spirits, middle realm spirits, and upper realm spirits. "

"The Xuanxing Realm Snake Realm Spirit should belong to the upper realm spirit, relying on the realm spirit condensed by himself, most of them are lower realm spirits, and a very small number are middle realm spirits, if you want to condense the upper realm spirit, you must cultivate the inheritance of the upper realm spirit. "

Other than that.

He has joined the Realm Court, and he can enter the realm of the Realm God Kingdom at any time, but he has just joined the realm of the realm, and he cannot apply to enter the realm of the realm of the gods at present, and he must have certain qualifications, otherwise he wants to enter the realm of the realm of the gods, then the eternal realm will be abolished.

The Eternal Realm is the foundation of the Realm, there are a large number of Eternal Realms here, and there are also many good things, and the Realm God Realm cannot lose the Eternal Realm, so the Eternal Realm cannot be abandoned.

"At the beginning, the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods did not have the qualifications to enter the realm of the Realm of Gods, so he has been staying in the realm of the Ten Thousand Gods Kingdom!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Later, the Lord of the Great Gods should have enough qualifications, so he applied to go to the realm of the gods and obtained the qualifications from the realm of the gods to relocate the kingdom of the gods.

Ye Tian didn't ask what it would cost to relocate an Eternal Realm to the Realm God Realm, he just joined the Realm Court, naturally focusing on understanding, the relocation of the Eternal Realm was still far away from him, so there was no need to be in such a hurry to ask.

Afterwards.

Ye Tian left from the Boundary Court, it was useless for him to stay in the Boundary Court.

He won't be given resources for free here, everything has to be on his own.

Of course.

He obtained a map of the Eternal Realm from the Realm Court, which recorded a large number of Eternal Realms, as well as some special places.

For example, the Eternal Yin Wind Belt and the Jiudu River are all on it, but they are just small and unknown places in the Eternal Realm, and some places are even extremely dangerous if they go to the Eternal Realm God Realm, and they will fall and die if they are not careful.

For example, the closest danger to the Endless Realm Alliance - the Abyss of Despair.

There is no Eternal Realm near the Abyss of Despair, it is very dangerous here, and even the danger radiates to the surrounding territory, and if you are close to the Eternal Realm Divine Realm at half a step, you will be transformed by demons.

Although the Eternal Realm Divine Realm was able to enter the Abyss of Despair, it did not dare to enter the deepest depths, and he was also worried about being injured in the Abyss of Despair.

Once you get hurt, you may be affected and become a demon.

For example, the kind of Eternal Realm Divine Realm that was almost a demon seed in the half-step Eternal Realm Divine Realm, although it completely solidified the Eternal Dao Seed, the Eternal Dao Seed was also on the verge of danger.

Under normal circumstances, this Eternal Realm Divine Realm would not become a demon seed, but when it enters the abyss of despair, it will 100% become a demon seed.

Therefore, there are also many demon seeds hidden in the abyss of despair, including many demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm, and even low-level demon seeds of the Eternal Realm God Realm, which can even mobilize the power of the realm spirits.

No, it's not a realm spirit anymore, it's a demon spirit.

This demon seed is very terrifying, and the spirit of the demon seed has been strengthened, surpassing the previous realm spirit.

"The Abyss of Despair, it's not too far away from the Endless Realm Alliance, maybe you can go over and explore. "

Ye Tian muttered.
